itinerary.day1:
Day 1 — Arrival & Duomo District
• Arrive at MXP or LIN; Malpensa Express or bus to Centrale (validated 45–55 min)
• Check-in near Duomo or Brera; lunch at autogrill or Navigli cafe
• Afternoon: Duomo di Milano (pre-book roof or terraces); Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
• Evening: aperitivo in Navigli; dinner along the canals
itinerary.day2:
Day 2 — Art, Design & La Scala Corridor
• Morning: Santa Maria delle Grazie (Last Supper; pre-book timed entry)
• Lunch: risotto or cotoletta near Brera
• Afternoon: Pinacoteca di Brera or Castello Sforzesco; Parco Sempione
• Evening: opera at La Scala district or dinner in Porta Nuova
itinerary.day3:
Day 3 — Lakes or Fashion District Finish
• Morning: half-day to Lake Como (train to Como or Varenna) or Quadrilatero fashion walk
• Lunch: lakeside trattoria or Eataly Smeraldo
• Afternoon: return for Last-minute Duomo photos or San Siro stadium tour if pre-booked
• Evening: farewell dinner in Brera; pack with Malpensa Express timing confirmed

meta.faqSnippet: Alfred helps sequence Milan's timed entries (Last Supper, Duomo roof) with Malpensa transfers so ground-transport days stay executable.

itinerary.day1:
Day 1 —
• Arrive at Munich Airport (MUC) and take the S8 train to Marienplatz (45 min)
• Explore Marienplatz and visit the New Town Hall (1.5 hours)
• Lunch at Viktualienmarkt (1 hour)
• Visit the Munich Residenz (2 hours)
• Dinner at Hofbräuhaus Munich (1.5 hours)
• Return to hotel via metro (30 min)
itinerary.day2:
Day 2 —
• Breakfast at hotel (1 hour)
• Take the U2 metro to Nymphenburg Palace (30 min)
• Explore Nymphenburg Palace and Gardens (2.5 hours)
• Lunch at a nearby café (1 hour)
• Visit the BMW Museum (2 hours)
• Dinner in the Schwabing district (1.5 hours)
• Return to hotel via tram (30 min)
itinerary.day3:
Day 3 —
• Breakfast at hotel (1 hour)
• Take the S-Bahn to Dachau Concentration Camp Memorial Site (40 min)
• Tour the memorial site (2 hours)
• Lunch in Dachau (1 hour)
• Return to Munich and visit the English Garden (2 hours)
• Dinner at a traditional Bavarian restaurant (1.5 hours)
• Depart from Munich Airport (MUC) (45 min)

meta.faqSnippet: Alfred helps you navigate Munich's rich history and vibrant culture effortlessly.

itinerary.day1:
Day 1 — Fira Caldera & Arrival
• Arrive at JTR; pre-book transfer or bus to Fira (validated 25–40 min)
• Check-in caldera-view hotel in Fira or Imerovigli; light lunch with cliff views
• Afternoon: Fira cliff walk, Museum of Prehistoric Thera if open
• Evening: sunset drinks in Imerovigli; dinner with caldera timing confirmed
itinerary.day2:
Day 2 — Oia & Beaches
• Morning: bus or taxi to Oia before crowds; Amoudi Bay steps
• Lunch: seafood in Oia or Fira return
• Afternoon: Red Beach or Perissa black-sand block (choose one; 2+ hrs)
• Evening: Oia sunset spot (arrive 90 min early in peak season); late dinner in Fira
itinerary.day3:
Day 3 — Akrotiri & Wine Route
• Morning: Akrotiri archaeological site (pre-book timed entry)
• Lunch: Pyrgos village taverna or winery tasting
• Afternoon: Santo Wines or Art Space winery; pack for ferry/flight buffer
• Evening: farewell meze; confirm JTR transfer with island traffic buffer

meta.faqSnippet: Alfred sequences Santorini ferry/flight buffers, Oia sunset crowds, and caldera hotel transfers so island days stay executable.

itinerary.day1:
Day 1 — Beach & Bauhaus Core
• Arrive at TLV; train or taxi to central Tel Aviv (validated 25–40 min)
• Check-in near Rothschild or the beach strip; lunch at Carmel Market
• Afternoon: Rothschild Boulevard Bauhaus walk, Independence Hall if timed
• Evening: beach promenade sunset; dinner in Levinsky spice market area
itinerary.day2:
Day 2 — Jaffa & Neve Tzedek
• Morning: Old Jaffa port, flea market, St. Peter's Church views
• Lunch: hummus in Jaffa or Florentin
• Afternoon: Neve Tzedek galleries; optional ANU Museum
• Evening: dinner in Sarona or Port area; note Friday sunset Shabbat timing if relevant
itinerary.day3:
Day 3 — North Coast or Culture Finish
• Morning: Tel Aviv Museum of Art OR Herzliya marina half-day
• Lunch: shakshuka brunch or fish at the port
• Afternoon: Sarona Market errands or final beach block
• Evening: farewell dinner; confirm TLV departure with Friday/Saturday transport checks

meta.faqSnippet: Alfred helps pace Tel Aviv beach days, Jaffa walks, and Shabbat-aware timing so city breaks stay realistic.

itinerary.day1:
Day 1 — Giza Plateau
• Arrive at CAI; pre-book driver or Uber to Giza area (validated 45–75 min with traffic)
• Check-in near Giza or Zamalek; lunch with pyramid views if possible
• Afternoon: Giza pyramids and Great Sphinx (pre-book guide/tickets)
• Evening: light Sound & Light show OR early night before heavy walking day
itinerary.day2:
Day 2 — Egyptian Museum & Khan el-Khalili
• Morning: Grand Egyptian Museum or Egyptian Museum (check which wing is open)
• Lunch: falafel near Tahrir or Zamalek café
• Afternoon: Khan el-Khalili bazaar with fixed meet point for groups
• Evening: Nile felucca at sunset; dinner in Zamalek
itinerary.day3:
Day 3 — Islamic Cairo & Citadel
• Morning: Saladin Citadel and Mosque of Muhammad Ali
• Lunch: koshari or grilled chicken in Islamic Cairo
• Afternoon: Al-Azhar Park views or Coptic Cairo if time
• Evening: farewell meal; confirm CAI transfer with peak-hour buffer

meta.faqSnippet: Alfred builds Cairo days around traffic buffers, museum hours, and Giza timing so pyramid visits do not collapse the rest of the trip.
